# Toasty Mittens

## Description

Toasty Mittens is an Ancient Relic offered by Tezcatara. At the start of your turn, Exhaust the top card of your Draw Pile and gain 1 Strength.

---

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- High Strength upside, but the automatic top-card exhaust can delete key draw-pile cards; avoid when the deck relies on exact power/draw/burst timing unless it has redundant card access.
